requirement_topic.en: Colombian Market Access and Conformity Assessment
requirement_topic.zh: 哥伦比亚市场准入与符合性评定
requirement_topic.zht: 哥倫比亞市場准入與符合性評定

summary.en: Placing power tools on the Colombian market generally requires a Certificate of Conformity issued by an ONAC-accredited certification body against the applicable adopted NTC/IEC standard, and compliance with the relevant technical regulation (RETIE for electrical products wired into installations; RETILAP for lighting; RETIQ for energy labelling where applicable). The Superintendencia de Industria y Comercio (SIC) enforces these obligations and may verify certificates at the point of sale or import. An in-country importer or responsible economic operator is typically required, and goods clear through ports such as Cartagena and Buenaventura.
summary.zh: 在哥伦比亚市场投放电动工具通常需要由 ONAC 认可的认证机构按适用的采用 NTC/IEC 标准出具符合性证书，并满足相关技术规章（电气产品接入装置适用 RETIE；照明适用 RETILAP；适用时能效标识适用 RETIQ）。工商监管局（SIC）负责执法，可在销售或进口环节核验证书。通常需要境内进口商或负责的经济经营者，货物经卡塔赫纳、布埃纳文图拉等口岸通关。
summary.zht: 在哥倫比亞市場投放電動工具通常需要由 ONAC 認可的認證機構按適用的採用 NTC/IEC 標準出具符合性證書，並滿足相關技術規章（電氣產品接入裝置適用 RETIE；照明適用 RETILAP；適用時能效標識適用 RETIQ）。工商監管局（SIC）負責執法，可在銷售或進口環節核驗證書。通常需要境內進口商或負責的經濟經營者，貨物經卡塔赫納、布埃納文圖拉等口岸通關。

standards_or_laws: Certificate of Conformity (Certificado de Conformidad) from an ONAC-accredited certification body against adopted NTC/IEC 62841
RETIE technical regulation for electrical products wired into installations; RETILAP for lighting; RETIQ for energy labelling where applicable
SIC (Superintendencia de Industria y Comercio) market enforcement and certificate verification
In-country importer / responsible economic operator requirement

summary.en: China power-tool files commonly reference the GB/T 3883 series and, where in scope, CCC certification as the domestic market-entry baseline. A GB/T 3883 report or CCC mark does not constitute a Colombian Certificate of Conformity, does not satisfy RETIE, and is not recognized by SIC as local conformity evidence on its own.
summary.zh: 中国电动工具文件通常引用 GB/T 3883 系列，并在适用时以 CCC 认证作为境内市场准入基线。GB/T 3883 报告或 CCC 标志不构成哥伦比亚符合性证书，不满足 RETIE，且 SIC 不会单独承认其为当地符合性证据。
summary.zht: 中國電動工具文件通常引用 GB/T 3883 系列，並在適用時以 CCC 認證作為境內市場准入基線。GB/T 3883 報告或 CCC 標誌不構成哥倫比亞符合性證書，不滿足 RETIE，且 SIC 不會單獨承認其為當地符合性證據。

gap.en: A China domestic safety report or CCC mark is not enough for Colombian placement. The importer needs a Certificate of Conformity from an ONAC-accredited body against the adopted NTC/IEC standard, a RETIE applicability assessment, an established in-country importer, and Spanish-language documentation aligned to SIC enforcement and customs clearance.
gap.zh: 中国国内安全报告或 CCC 标志不足以支持投放哥伦比亚市场。进口商需要由 ONAC 认可机构按采用的 NTC/IEC 标准出具的符合性证书、RETIE 适用性评估、设立境内进口商，以及与 SIC 执法和海关通关相符的西班牙语文件。
gap.zht: 中國國內安全報告或 CCC 標誌不足以支援投放哥倫比亞市場。進口商需要由 ONAC 認可機構按採用的 NTC/IEC 標準出具的符合性證書、RETIE 適用性評估、設立境內進口商，以及與 SIC 執法和海關通關相符的西班牙語文件。

target.en: Mandatory legal layer: Certificate of Conformity from an ONAC-accredited certification body plus applicable technical regulation (RETIE/RETILAP/RETIQ) compliance, enforced by SIC, with an in-country importer. Adopted NTC/IEC standards are the conformity-assessment basis.
target.zh: 强制法律层：由 ONAC 认可的认证机构出具符合性证书，并满足适用技术规章（RETIE/RETILAP/RETIQ），由 SIC 执法，且设有境内进口商。采用的 NTC/IEC 标准是符合性评定依据。
target.zht: 強制法律層：由 ONAC 認可的認證機構出具符合性證書，並滿足適用技術規章（RETIE/RETILAP/RETIQ），由 SIC 執法，且設有境內進口商。採用的 NTC/IEC 標準是符合性評定依據。

cn.en: Mandatory China domestic baseline commonly uses GB/T 3883 series, with CCC where the product is in CCC scope.
cn.zh: 中国境内强制基线通常采用 GB/T 3883 系列，产品在 CCC 范围内时加 CCC。
cn.zht: 中國境內強制基線通常採用 GB/T 3883 系列，產品在 CCC 範圍內時加 CCC。

source.publisher: Superintendencia de Industria y Comercio (SIC), Colombia

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Not Colombia-ready as-is if the product file only contains GB/T 3883 evidence or a CCC mark. A Certificate of Conformity from an ONAC-accredited body, a RETIE applicability assessment, an in-country importer, and SIC-aligned Spanish documentation are required before placement.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 若产品文件仅含 GB/T 3883 证据或 CCC 标志，则现状不能视为哥伦比亚就绪。投放前须取得 ONAC 认可机构的符合性证书、RETIE 适用性评估、设立境内进口商，并提供与 SIC 相符的西班牙语文件。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 若產品文件僅含 GB/T 3883 證據或 CCC 標誌，則現狀不能視為哥倫比亞就緒。投放前須取得 ONAC 認可機構的符合性證書、RETIE 適用性評估、設立境內進口商，並提供與 SIC 相符的西班牙語文件。
